title: Protagonist
stringSn:
<color=#FF423F>%s</color>, the young man who awakened to the power of Persona. As the Phantom Thief "Wonder", you resolved to return the desire that had been stolen from the world.
Since then, it has been <color=#FF423F>%s days</color>... As the leader of the Phantom Thieves, you have reached Level <color=#FF423F>%s</color>. To date, you have spent
<color=#FF423F>%s Stamina, %s Action Points, and %s yen</color>... And you continue to give it your all as you balance your double life as a regular student and a Phantom Thief.

title: Phantom Thieves
stringSn:
So far you have forged contracts with <color=#FF423F>%s Phantom Thieves and Phantom Idols</color>.
Among them, <color=#FF423F>%s</color> have become your most powerful allies, with total ratings of <color=#FF423F>%s</color>.
No matter what dangers may come, you know these allies will have your back.

title: Synergy
stringSn:
In this world where desires have been stolen...
You have formed bonds with <color=#FF423F>%s Accomplices</color>. Among them, you became <color=#FF423F>Close Friends</color> with <color=#FF423F>%s</color> and <color=#FF423F>Soulmates</color> with <color=#FF423F>%s</color>.Your deepest bonds are with
<color=#FF423F>%s</color>...
You have forged powerful connections at <color=#FF423F>Ranks %s</color>.

title: Strong Enemies
stringSn:
The Phantom Thieves have fought countless battles against fearsome foes. As of Version 2.5, the most dangerous of these has been <color=#FF423F>Shadow Miyazawa</color>, forcing <color=#FF423F>72.1</color>% of Phantom Thieves to taste defeat.
And in <color=#FF423F>Recollections</color>, when facing <color=#FF423F>Takeyuki Kiuchi</color> in battle, <color=#FF423F>71.8</color>% of Phantom Thieves were slammed into submission.
